overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white geometric-patterned poncho exploring a futuristic habitation module. The environment features industrial metal walls, exposed piping, and residential furnishings including a desk, bunk bed, and couch.

scene_state.functional_zone: sci-fi habitation module entry with industrial piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the habitation module toward the desk area

entered.detail: tall metal storage rack with multiple shelves and a white container
large vertical and horizontal metal pipes running along walls and ceiling
black desk with horizontal slatted window above it containing glowing lights
metal frame bunk bed with white mattress visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a compact industrial living space with metal shelving on the left and exposed piping overhead. The camera follows as they walk toward a desk area with a distinctive slatted window, while a metal bunk bed is visible in the background on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: habitation module work and sleep area

events.description: character passes the desk and continues toward the sleeping area

agents.ego_description: walking past the desk and office chair, moving deeper into the room toward the bed

entered.detail: black ergonomic office chair with wheels positioned at the desk
large black flatscreen monitor mounted on the wall
metal chest of drawers with items on top including a red object

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the desk and office chair, revealing a wall-mounted TV and storage containers. The metal bunk bed becomes more prominent in the center of the view as the shelving unit disappears behind. The industrial piping remains visible overhead throughout the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: habitation module living area with exit airlock

events.description: character slows briefly near the bed before continuing toward the exit

agents.ego_description: pausing near the bunk bed then walking toward the airlock door at the end of the room

entered.detail: light blue upholstered sofa with metal frame against the right wall
large metal sliding door with horizontal ridges and overhead lighting
stand with hanging garments next to the couch

segments.scene_description: In the final area of the module, the character approaches a cushioned couch and coat rack on the right, with a large airlock door ahead. The desk and TV are now behind, while the bunk bed shifts to the left side of the frame. The character walks steadily toward the illuminated exit door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a compact industrial living module that transitions from a cluttered storage area into a residential space and finally toward an exit. It begins by following the character past metal shelving and exposed overhead piping as they approach a desk area with a slatted window and a bunk bed in the background. As the character moves past the office chair, the view shifts to reveal a wall-mounted TV and storage containers while the bunk bed moves into the center of the frame. The scene then expands into the final section of the module, passing a cushioned couch and coat rack on the right as the bunk bed shifts to the left. Finally, the camera tracks the character's steady progress away from the living quarters and toward a large, illuminated airlock door.
